basic_details.job_title: UCSL Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Assistant Manager (Electrical & Mechanical) posts! Published on 11.05.2026 at UCSL Official Website , this new recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age of 30 years (with relaxations for OBC, SC, and Ex-servicemen as per Govt. rules) and possessing a Degree in Electrical / Mechanical / Marine / Naval Architecture Engineering or Diploma in Electrical / Mechanical / Mechatronics / Marine / Shipbuilding Engineering with required post-qualification experience

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 30 years as on 04-06-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: OBC: 3 years SC: 5 years Ex-servicemen: As per Govt. of India guidelines, max 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Electrical/Mechanical/Marine/Naval Architecture Engineering or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical/Mechatronics/Marine/Shipbuilding Engineering.
qualification.details: Assistant Manager (Electrical): Degree in Electrical or Electronics or Electrical & Electronics or Instrumentation or Electrical & Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognized University. Minimum of three-year Diploma in Electrical or Electronics or Mechatronics or Shipbuilding Engineering from a State Board of Technical Education. Experience: i) For degree holders: Minimum of Three years post qualification experience. ii) For diploma holders: Minimum of Five years post qualification experience. Experience in Electrical Outfitting/Caballing/ Commissioning/ Installation in a Shipbuilding or Ship repair or Offshore Fabrication Company or Petrochemical Company or Marine related Engineering Company or Marine related Government / Semi Government Company / Establishment. Assistant Manager (Mechanical): Degree in Mechanical or Marine or Naval Architecture Engineering from a recognized University. Minimum of three-year Diploma in Mechanical or Mechatronics or Marine or Shipbuilding Engineering from a State Board of Technical Education. Experience: i) For degree holders: Minimum of Three years post qualification experience. ii) For diploma holders: Minimum of Five years post qualification experience. Experience in Machinery/ Installation & Commissioning/ Hull Fabrication Piping/Procurement /Inventory/Supply chain Management in a Shipbuilding or Ship repair or Offshore Fabrication Company or Petrochemical Company or Marine related Engineering Company or Marine related Government / Semi Government Company / Establishment.

selection_process: Objective Type Test (50 marks) Personal Interview (20 marks) Power Point presentation (30 marks)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the UCSL Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the UCSL Assistant Manager recruitment is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Electrical/Mechanical/Marine/Naval Architecture Engineering or a Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical/Mechatronics/Marine/Shipbuilding Engineering from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Assistant Manager posts, distributed between Electrical and Mechanical disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all candidates is 30 years as of 04 June 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for UCSL Assistant Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: General and OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 400/- plus bank charges. SC/ST candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for UCSL Assistant Manager jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Objective Type Test, a Personal Interview, and a Power Point presentation.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager role?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay per month ranges from Rs. 49,500/- to Rs. 54,540/- over a period of 5 years, increasing annually.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Assistant Manager posts is on a contract basis for a period of 5 years.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for UCSL recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or from the UCSL official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the mode of application for UCSL Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official UCSL website. Offline applications will not be accepted.
